allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} products, {len\(set\(p[\\"brand\\"] for p in d\)\)} brands'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/products.json'\); console.log\(d.length + ' products, ' + new Set\(d.map\(p=>p.brand\)\).size + ' brands: ' + [...new Set\(d.map\(p=>p.brand\)\)].join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(python3 ui_ux_pro_max_skill/scripts/search.py "sports outdoor discovery platform" --domain style)
Bash(python3 ui_ux_pro_max_skill/scripts/search.py "mobile navigation bottom bar" --domain ux)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/d/thediscmill/public/data/discs_fallback.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Total discs:', d.length\); console.log\('With flight data:', d.filter\(x => x.speed || x.glide || x.turn || x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With zero flight:', d.filter\(x => !x.speed && !x.glide && !x.turn && !x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With descriptions:', d.filter\(x => x.description\).length\); console.log\('HTML in desc:', d.filter\(x => x.description && x.description.includes\('<'\)\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./public/data/discs_fallback.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Total discs:', d.length\); console.log\('With flight data:', d.filter\(x => x.speed || x.glide || x.turn || x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With zero flight:', d.filter\(x => !x.speed && !x.glide && !x.turn && !x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With descriptions:', d.filter\(x => x.description\).length\); console.log\('HTML in desc:', d.filter\(x => x.description && x.description.includes\('<'\)\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./data/discs_final.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Total discs in final:', d.length\); console.log\('With flight data:', d.filter\(x => x.speed || x.glide || x.turn || x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With zero flight:', d.filter\(x => !x.speed && !x.glide && !x.turn && !x.fade\).length\); console.log\('With descriptions:', d.filter\(x => x.description\).length\); console.log\('HTML in desc:', d.filter\(x => x.description && x.description.includes\('<'\)\).length\);")
